title: Reproducibility pipeline and manuscript for: A Gauge-Free Predictive Model for the Tidal-Sampling Bias of Sun-Synchronous Satellites, Validated on Macrotidal Tidal Flats
description: Code, derived-data pipeline, and manuscript sources for the study deriving and validating a closed-form model (mean bias = beta * A * <cos theta>) for the systematic tide-sampling bias of optical waterline intertidal DEMs, over five macrotidal Korean tidal flats (2020-2024). Submitted to the Journal of Marine Science and Engineering (MDPI).

creators.name: Song, Taeyoon
creators.affiliation: Inha University; Haebom Data Inc., Republic of Korea
